title: U Cinn - Triglyceride Assay
author: Patrick Tso
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xm4fk8w

steps.title: Prepare Working Standards by making a...
steps.instruction: Prepare Working Standards by making a serial dilution of the stock 200mg/dl standard. (See diagram below) *Stock standard is included in kit

steps.title: Prepare Working Reagent by reconstituting one...
steps.instruction: Prepare Working Reagent by reconstituting one vial of Enzyme Reagent R1b with a portion of Buffer R1a and then transfer entire contents to bottle R1a , rinsing vial R1b several times.

steps.title: Using a 96 well flat bottom...
steps.instruction: Using a 96 well flat bottom plate, into separate wells, pipette 2μL of deionized water, standard, or sample to be assayed.

steps.title: Add 200μL of reconstituted Working Reagent to all wells
steps.instruction: Add 200μL of reconstituted Working Reagent to all wells.

steps.title: Determine the absorbance (abs) of the...
steps.instruction: Determine the absorbance (abs) of the standards and of each unknown at 500nm.

steps.title: Calculate values of unknowns from the standard curve
steps.instruction: Calculate values of unknowns from the standard curve. Specimen: Serum or Plasma. Specimen stable for 7 days at 2-8°C or 3 months at -20°C. Assay Linearity: 1172 mg/dl Working Reagent Stability After Reconstitution: 21 days stored at 2-8°C. PROTECT FROM LIGHT Stability of Final Reaction: 60 minutes
